provider_form.name_description: Human-readable label for this identity provider
provider_form.issuer_description: Expected iss claim value in the JWT
provider_form.jwks_url_description: HTTPS endpoint serving the provider's JSON Web Key Set
provider_form.audience_description: Expected aud claim(s) in the JWT, comma-separated.
provider_form.user_claims_description: Comma-separated JWT claims to match against the Plane email (first match wins)
provider_form.user_claims_required: At least one user claim is required.
provider_form.allowed_algorithms_description: Asymmetric algorithms accepted for JWT signature verification
provider_form.allowed_algorithms_required: At least one algorithm is required.
provider_form.jwks_cache_ttl_description: How long to cache the provider's JWKS keys (minimum 60s, default 24 hours)
provider_form.jwks_cache_ttl_min: Cache TTL must be at least 60 seconds.
provider_form.rate_limit_description: Request throttle as count/period (e.g. 120/minute). Leave blank for the default rate limit.
